title: Federal Reserve Board - 2026 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This Federal Reserve webpage is an index listing 2026 FOMC press releases. It references FOMC statements issued on March 18, 2026 and January 28, 2026, along with economic projections released March 18, 2026 from the March 17-18 FOMC meeting. However, the actual statement text and policy decisions are not included in this source—only links to those documents.
key_points: The page lists FOMC statements issued on 3/18/2026 and 1/28/2026
Economic projections from the March 17-18 FOMC meeting were released on 3/18/2026
On 1/28/2026, the FOMC reaffirmed its Statement on Longer-Run Goals and Monetary Policy Strategy
The actual FOMC statement text, policy decisions, vote tallies, and forward guidance are not present in this source
The page is an index/navigation page rather than the actual policy statements
why_it_matters: This source serves as an index to Federal Reserve policy communications but does not contain the actual policy content. Researchers seeking the specific rate decisions, statement language, or economic projections will need to access the linked documents directly. The index confirms that notable FOMC events occurred on the listed dates but provides no substantive policy details.
macro_context: The source confirms FOMC activity in early 2026 (January and March statements) but provides no details on policy decisions or economic assessments that would inform macro outlook.

issues_found: Source is an index/listing page, not the actual FOMC statements - event_type 'fomc_statement' is incorrect classification
No policy decisions, rate changes, vote tallies, or forward guidance present
No actual statement text reproduced - only titles and dates of linked documents
Content is extremely thin (218 words) - mostly navigation and boilerplate
Rule 5 violation: source functions as a listing page despite PAGE_TYPE metadata claiming 'press_release'
Low archival value - the actual policy content must be accessed via separate documents

human_review.notes: The generated record accurately identifies the source's limitations (index page with no actual policy content), but the source itself fails verification standards. Even though the record correctly notes this is a listing page, the source cannot produce a meaningful research record for macro catalyst analysis. The actual FOMC statements and projections referenced (dated 3/18/2026 and 1/28/2026) would need to be scraped from their individual pages to create archival-worthy records.

notes: Source is a Federal Reserve index page listing 2026 FOMC press releases. Contains no actual policy text. Dated March 18, 2026, which is within 90 days of TODAY (2026-03-31), so not stale. However, the source has very limited content—only dates and titles of statements. Cannot extract any policy-relevant details from this source alone. For meaningful FOMC archival records, the actual statement and projections documents should be used instead.
